title: Phase C: Swift Xcode adaptation examples
outOfScope: 特定プロジェクト向け preset

sources.reason: Phase C acceptance for Xcode examples and GitLab CI scope reinforcement.
Swift adaptation example to extend with Xcode and Coverage samples.
configure_ai_cockpit scope list to reinforce GitLab CI.

problemStatement: Phase A documented local calibration conceptually; Phase C adds neutral Xcode and CocoaPods manual calibration examples without introducing a dedicated ios-cocoapods stack or changing template coverage defaults.

executionDecision.reason: Phase C scope and acceptance are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm examples use MyApp placeholders only.
Confirm template coverage_policy.yaml default is unchanged.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Example documentation must stay illustrative and project-neutral.

acceptance: examples/swift/README.md documents that examples/ is illustrative and not copied during installation.
examples/swift/README.md adds an Xcode or workspace section with neutral xcodebuild test -workspace, -configuration, and pre-test pod install guidance.
examples/swift/README.md adds Xcode-oriented Coverage Guard include and exclude examples such as Pods exclusion without changing template defaults.
docs/getting-started/installation.md reinforces that configure_ai_cockpit scope includes .gitlab-ci.yml for GitLab-hosted repositories.
guidelines: examples/swift/README.md body is Japanese with YAML front matter author: Ray.
Use MyApp placeholders only; no customer-specific identifiers.
Do not narrow template coverage_policy.yaml defaults.
rollbackNote: Revert Phase C example and installation doc edits.
